exercises.title: Inspect security headers
exercises.description: Use curl to inspect CSP, X-Frame-Options, and cookie headers on a site.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can identify which security headers are present or missing.

exercises.title: Check SameSite and HttpOnly
exercises.description: Open DevTools and inspect the cookies set by a local app or demo site.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can see HttpOnly, Secure, and SameSite attributes on cookies.

exercises.title: Demonstrate CORS behavior
exercises.description: Create a tiny server and a cross-origin page that tries to fetch it, then adjust the response headers.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can show a blocked fetch and then a successful CORS-enabled fetch.

exercises.title: Build an XSS-safe renderer
exercises.description: Write a small HTML renderer that escapes user input before inserting it into the page.
exercises.expected_outcome: Injected HTML is displayed as text instead of executing.

exercises.title: Add CSRF protection
exercises.description: Implement a token-based CSRF defense in a tiny form submission app and verify cross-site requests fail.
exercises.expected_outcome: Legitimate submissions succeed while forged cross-site posts are rejected.

exercises.title: Harden a mini app with CSP
exercises.description: Add a strict CSP, nonce-based scripts, and frame blocking to a demo app.
exercises.expected_outcome: The app only runs approved scripts and refuses framing.
